race.comment: DEL LIRENZA (11) was well in commission last start over 1200m at Mt Gambier when third, beaten 6 lengths having jumped $2.10. The debut at Ararat reads well and the stable typically strike very highly here, expect the 3k claimer to charge forward and prove too slick. NOT GUILTY (3) has started twice, running a good third on debut then finishing sixth, beaten 3.5 lengths, last time over 1000m at Moe. Can improve again and draws for a beautiful trail. HIGHLIGHT REEL (1) is a gelding by Highland Reel out of Here De Fox on debut. Placed in a recent trial for the Conlan yard and can run a forward race. BOA VISTA (4) faded last time to finish ninth over 1100m at Geelong after showing good early speed. Her best form reads very well for this, respecting.
